title: Ice Route Teach
intendedTensionBeat: The visible rescue route is blocked by ice, but the first useful ice clear is obvious and low-risk.
intendedReleaseBeat: Breaking the ice immediately reveals rescue progress and teaches that ice is future value, not generic obstruction.
expectedPath: Clear the debris adjacent to the iced route, break the ice, then finish opening the puppy with a clean low-residue dock path.
expectedFailMode: Player ignores the iced route and spends actions on broad side clears that do not advance rescue.
designNotes: First dedicated ice-band teach. Keep water forgiving; the lesson is route value, not pressure.
